vocab.word: a picture is worth a thousand words
vocab.ipa: /ə ˈpɪktʃər ɪz wɜːrθ ə ˈθaʊznd wɜːrdz/
vocab.meaning: một bức ảnh thay cho ngàn lời nói
vocab.example: I'm a firm believer that a picture is worth a thousand words, as it captures emotions that descriptions simply cannot.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong chớp mắt (khoảnh khắc cực nhanh)
vocab.example: Photography allows me to freeze beauty that would otherwise disappear in the blink of an eye.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng/thưởng ngoạn thứ gì đó đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: I love traveling to the mountains just to feast my eyes on the scenery and document it with my camera.

vocab.word: take a trip down memory lane
vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng lại những kỷ niệm trong quá khứ
vocab.example: Looking through my old photo albums is like taking a trip down memory lane; it brings back so many forgotten joys.

vocab.meaning: người thích chụp ảnh mọi lúc mọi nơi
vocab.example: I must admit I’m quite snap-happy; I tend to photograph everything from my morning coffee to a sunset.

vocab.meaning: phần thưởng thêm/niềm vui bồi thêm vào một trải nghiệm tốt
vocab.example: Being able to capture a rare bird on film was the icing on the cake of our hiking trip.
My photographs bear witness to the rapid changes my neighborhood has undergone over the last decade.

vocab.word: at the push of a button
vocab.meaning: vô cùng dễ dàng (chỉ bằng một nút bấm)
vocab.example: With modern smartphones, professional-quality memories can be created at the push of a button.

vocab.word: leave someone to their own devices
vocab.meaning: để mặc ai đó tự do làm điều mình thích
vocab.example: If you leave me to my own devices in a scenic park, I'll spend the entire afternoon taking macro shots of flowers.
The clarity of the latest mirrorless cameras is second to none, making the hobby more addictive than ever.
